info.title: The Protocol
info.lead: Designed for those who make no compromises. «The Protocol» ensures that your daily protective ritual never pauses. For just 2.15 CHF a day, this is the most efficient way to supply your body with over 190 bioactive compounds and all four Omega fatty acids.
info.advantageBody: Whether for the home-office team, the whole family or as a long-term cure for maximum cellular regeneration – this package offers the outstanding AmberNord value. Protect your eyes from blue light and strengthen your immune resilience at the highest natural level.
info.scienceItem1: 6× 250 ml of purest, cold-pressed organic essence (Zelt Selection).
info.scienceItem2: The absolute most efficient investment in your cellular health.
info.scienceItem3: Yields up to 18 litres of vitalising premium drink.
info.scienceItem4: Free premium shipping directly from our logistics centre in Aarau.
info.shippingText: Free premium shipping within Switzerland. Direct shipping from our logistics centre in Aarau.
